name: ScrollRight
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollRight(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)

Scroll the pixel window 1 pixel to the right.

Parameters:
    x1, y1: top-left pixel of the window
    x2, y2: bottom-right pixel of the window

name: ScrollLeft
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollLeft(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)

Scroll the pixel window 1 pixel to the left.

Parameters:
    x1, y1: top-left pixel of the window
    x2, y2: bottom-right pixel of the window

name: ScrollUp
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollUp(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)

Scroll the pixel window 1 pixel up.

Parameters:
    x1, y1: top-left pixel of the window
    x2, y2: bottom-right pixel of the window

name: ScrollDown
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollDown(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)

Scroll the pixel window 1 pixel down.

Parameters:
    x1, y1: top-left pixel of the window
    x2, y2: bottom-right pixel of the window

name: ScrollRightAligned
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollRightAligned(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)

Scroll the pixel window 1 pixel to the right, aligned to character columns.
x1 and x2 are divided by 8 (floor) to get the column number (0..31).

Parameters:
    x1, y1: top-left pixel of the window
    x2, y2: bottom-right pixel of the window

name: ScrollLeftAligned
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollLeftAligned(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)

Scroll the pixel window 1 pixel to the left, aligned to character columns.
x1 and x2 are divided by 8 (floor) to get the column number (0..31).

Parameters:
    x1, y1: top-left pixel of the window
    x2, y2: bottom-right pixel of the window

parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte

name: ScrollDownAligned
parameters: x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte
doc:
Sub FASTCALL ScrollDownAligned(x1 As UByte, y1 As UByte, x2 As UByte, y2 As UByte)
